channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The 'Showdown' That Wasn't: Trump and Xi Exchange Charm at Luxe State Dinner
Senators Approve Forfeiting Their Own Pay During Shutdowns
item.description: Senators unanimously approved a resolution Thursday to withhold their pay during government shutdowns, aiming to make closures financially painful.

item.title: Get Ready America: Buc-ee's Expands to 6 New States This Year and Next
White House readout on Trump-Xi meeting omits Taiwan as China issues warning
item.description: The White House described the meeting between President Trump and President Xi in Beijing as 'good.'
